subcodes.title: Interview with five American teachers, Haifa, 1914-07-21
subcodes.first_line: The teachings of His Holiness Bahá'u'lláh are the breaths of the Holy Spirit which create man anew. Personal purity, both in private and public, is emphasized and insisted upon.
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @The Holy Spirit, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @purity of heart; sincerity of intention; sanctity
